treatment_steps: Assign to CRM specialist for a personal call within 24 hours (Gold/Platinum tier) or send a personalised service recovery email within 48 hours (Silver/Bronze tier) - do not use generic automated messaging
Credit 500 goodwill points to the account immediately as a service recovery gesture, framed as a thank-you for the customer's patience
Monitor NPS score and support ticket count at day 7 and day 14 - if NPS has not improved or a new ticket is raised, re-escalate to senior CRM team
escalation_condition: Additional support ticket lodged within 7 days of initial outreach
engagement_policy: No promotional content until the service issue is confirmed resolved

treatment_steps: Send a win-back email on day 1 acknowledging the absence plainly, with a strong first-order incentive - 15% off or 750 bonus points (Gold/Platinum: 750 points; Silver/Bronze: 15% discount)
Follow up on day 10 with product highlights in the customer's top category, emphasising new arrivals since their last purchase
Send a final win-back offer on day 25 - if no engagement across all three touches, move to passive monitoring only
escalation_condition: No email open across all three win-back touches within 25 days
engagement_policy: Win-back window closes after 180 days of inactivity - do not invest beyond this threshold

treatment_steps: Trigger a personalised re-engagement email referencing the customer's top product category - Gold/Platinum: include a 500 points bonus offer; Silver/Bronze: include a points reminder and category highlight
Send a push notification or in-app message on day 7 if no email engagement, featuring new arrivals in their preferred category
Evaluate engagement signals at day 21 - if no response, escalate to CRM specialist for Gold/Platinum customers; move Silver/Bronze to passive monitoring
escalation_condition: No engagement signal within 21 days of first re-engagement touch
engagement_policy: Do not send generic campaigns - personalise outreach to the customer's top product category

treatment_steps: No active retention intervention required - customer is engaged and satisfied
Consider routing to referral or advocacy programme if NPS >= 9 and the customer has not yet participated
Monitor passively - flag for retention review only if recency exceeds 30 days or NPS drops below 7
escalation_condition: Recency exceeds 30 days or NPS drops below 7 - re-run classification at next review cycle
engagement_policy: No retention spend - route to referral or advocacy programme instead
